home.metaDescription: Hässelby Strands Sjöscoutkår is part of the Swedish Scouting Association. Sea Scouting has been active in Hässelby, near Stockholm, since 1959, offering outdoor adventure and sailing activities.
home.title: Welcome to
home.description:
We are a proud Sea Scout troop that provides children and young people with 
a safe place to grow, learn seamanship, and make lifelong friends.
